enhanced_content:
Cancellation & Refund Policy

Cancellations Orders can be cancelled within 2 hours of placement for a full refund. After 2 hours, a 30% deduction applies for prepaid orders (to cover processing and packaging costs). Once an order has been dispatched or shipped, cancellation or refund is not possible. To cancel an order, please email support@prachisorganics.com with your order details as soon as possible.

Refund Process

Approved refunds will be processed within 4 – 7 business days to your original payment method (credit card, debit card, or UPI). Refund timelines may vary depending on your bank or payment provider.

enhanced_content:
If Your Order Arrives Damaged

If your order reaches you in a damaged or defective condition, please inform us within 24 hours of delivery. To qualify for a replacement or refund: You must email us at

support@prachisorganics.com within 24 hours of delivery. Include your Order ID and a clear unboxing video showing the damage. Once verified, we’ll initiate a replacement or refund within 4 – 7 business days to your original payment method. Please Note: Requests made after 24 hours of delivery or without unboxing video proof will not be eligible for replacement or refund. Damages due to improper use, mishandling, or negligence after delivery are not covered.
